scripts.dev: concurrently --names "SERVER,CLIENT" --prefix-colors "magenta,cyan" "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.start: concurrently --names "SERVER,CLIENT" --prefix-colors "magenta,cyan" "npm start --prefix server" "npm run preview --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.build: npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
